emails.subject: Re: BPA #492613.01, 492612.01, 492611.01
emails.body: Re: BPA #492613.01, 492612.01, 492611.01 Diana Scholtes was the trader on these. She's not in today, but Sean Crandall said that a 1/8 trade date was okay. I've changed all the deals. Kate From: Kimberly Allen 01/24/2001 01:09 PM

emails.body: BPA #492613.01, 492612.01, 492611.01 Kate, BPA shows these trades as 1/8/01 trade date. They are 1/9 in Enpower. Could you check with Sean to verify? Thanks, Kimberly
